nasb.text: For I will make Samaria a heap of ruins in the open country, Planting places for a vineyard. I will pour her stones down into the valley And will lay bare her foundations.

esv.text: Therefore I will make Samaria a heap in the open country, a place for planting vineyards, and I will pour down her stones into the valley and uncover her foundations.

cnv.text: 所以我必使撒瑪利亞變成田間的廢堆， 作栽種葡萄之處； 我必把撒瑪利亞的石頭倒在谷中， 連它的根基都露出來。

ccb.text: “所以，我耶和华要使撒玛利亚沦为荒野的废墟， 成为种葡萄的地方。 我要把她的石头抛进山谷， 直到露出她的根基。
